commit.subject: LU-14551 ldlm: call reprocess on reply error
commit.message:
LU-14551 ldlm: call reprocess on reply error

On reply error the lock is destroyed, so call
reprocess even if cbpending flag is present.

Change-Id: I79bc6184c2cda78143615e2fd7a73e84d3f8ccf9
HPE-bug-id: LUS-9647
Fixes: 37932c4beb ("LU-10175 ldlm: IBITS lock convert instead of cancel")
Signed-off-by: Andriy Skulysh <c17819@cray.com>
Reviewed-by: Alexander Boyko <c17825@cray.com>
Reviewed-by: Vitaly Fertman <c17818@cray.com>
